_note: 写死的欢迎/示例卡片数据，格式与 /api/translate 返回一致。页面初次打开时展示（无需调API）。内容是对本工具的自我介绍——通用情景英语学习，不局限于咖啡。已含5种风格、无双语对照。
full_en: Hey there, welcome! Just type a sentence from your daily life, and you'll get natural spoken English with phonetics for every word.

styles.casual: Hey there, welcome! Just type a sentence from your daily life, and you'll get natural spoken English with phonetics for every word.
styles.formal: Welcome. Simply enter a sentence from your daily life, and you will receive natural spoken English with phonetic transcriptions for every word.
styles.vlog: Hey, welcome in! Alright, just type a sentence from your everyday life, and you know, you'll get natural spoken English with the phonetics for every single word.
styles.swagger: Yo, welcome! Just drop a line from your daily life, and boom — you're getting real spoken English with the phonetics for every word, you know what I'm saying?
styles.chill: Hey, welcome, dude. Just type out something from your day, and you'll get this nice easy spoken English with the sounds for every word. Cool, right?

chunks.en: Just type a sentence from your daily life,
chunks.cn: 输入一句你日常生活里的话，

chunks.en: and you'll get natural spoken English with phonetics for every word.
chunks.cn: 就能得到地道的英文口播，还有每个词的音标。

collocation_notes.note: 固定搭配，指“英语口语”，区别于书面英语。
